seo.title: Couscous with herbs and berries - Marinda Kook

html:
Couscous with herbs and berries

 

 

Ingredients:

  • 250 g couscous
  • Boiling water to cover the couscous
  • 30ml olive oil
  • 1 Thinly chopped red onion
  • 2 Crushed garlic cloves
  • 10ml fresh coriander
  • 10 ml fresh basil
  • 10ml thyme (stems removed)
  • 10ml finely chopped parsley
  • 125 ml chopped cranberries

 

 

Method:

  • Place the couscous in a flat wide bowl and cover with the boiling water according to the instructions on the packet.
  • Cover with cling wrap and let stand for 15 minutes.
  • Heat the oil and fry the onion for 2 minutes.
  • Add the garlic and stir for a further half minute.
  • Stir in the herbs.
  • Once the couscous is done, mix it together with the herb mixture and cook for a further 2 minutes.
  • Stir in the berries once the cooking process is complete.

 

Nutty buttered green beans:
